findings.issue: Petpooja POS row uses banned filler verb 'unlocks' — 'India's largest F&B POS — unlocks the F&B hyperlocal category for JioMart Quick'. Per tone-of-voice §7 banned vocabulary table, 'unlocks' must be replaced with 'delivers / produces / changes' or just state the outcome.
findings.fix: Replace 'unlocks' with 'opens'. New text: 'India's largest F&B POS — opens the F&B hyperlocal category for JioMart Quick.'

findings.issue: Date '2026-02-24' uses ISO format instead of the canonical DD-MMM-YYYY (per tone-of-voice §4). Every visible date on the register must be 'DD-MMM-YYYY'.
/catalog/index.html does not list Fynd Konnect as a catalog entry — only the mega-menu nav references it. Spec §6 explicitly defers this as 'lazy strategy', but flagging for completeness.
findings.fix: Add a Fynd Konnect entry to /catalog/index.html on the next catalog touch. Spec §6 acceptable for v0.1.

findings.issue: Cross-link 'see capability 10' anchors to '#pillar-2' (top of Pillar 2 section) rather than directly to capability 10. Per-capability anchor IDs not added.
findings.fix: Add id='cap-10' to the capability 10 card and update the link to '#cap-10'. Optional polish.

findings.issue: Spec §3 D2 documents the override (no §03 layered architecture; the diagram is in §02 instead and §03 becomes 'four pillars summary'). The decision is recorded in the spec, so this is compliant — flagging for the reviewer's awareness only.
findings.fix: No fix required. D2 in the spec covers this.

strengths: Section labels run §0 → §08 contiguously; chrome (nav, crumb, footer, version pill) all present and correct

Every claim on the page traces back to one of the 3 source files: ~800 brands and 3-4 lakh shipments → Partnership Review §3.1; 13 RBL capabilities → §4.2 table verbatim; Emazing 73%/8.8%/20%/100% + Mohd Suhel Ansari quote → DOC-20260224 case study

Brand portfolio (TUMI, GAP, WestElm, Pottery Barn, PB Kids, Sephora, Hamleys, Superdry, Ritu Kumar, Performax, Reliance Trends, YOUSTA, TIRA, Freshpik, Swadesh, 7-Eleven India, Nexus) rendered verbatim from source §2.2 / §4.1 with exact casing — 72 brand-name mentions, all consistent

13 capability deliveries grouped into 6 themes (Foundation Architecture · Compliance & Finance · Brand Enablement · Loyalty & Programmes · Payments Modernisation · Performance & Ops) with cap-badge numbering — mirrors source PDF §4.2 organisation exactly
Status pills accurate: 14× Live + 1× Building (capability 12 Split Payment Readiness — proactive assessment ahead of platform launch, matches source); no overclaims
Inline Emazing evidence card uses native HTML metric tiles (not the source PNG with embedded UI text), so all 4 numbers are legible and accessible — the supporting flow image is decorative
No banned constructions, no emojis, no exclamation marks; 'we / our team' avoided throughout; outcomes attributed to Reliance, not Fynd
Mobile (375px) renders cleanly without overflow; all 4 page resources return 200 status; only console message is the standard Tailwind CDN dev warning
Hero stat tiles read in plain English — '~800 live omni-seller brands', '3-4 lakh shipments / month', '13 RBL capability deliveries', '50+ marketplaces · 9+ countries' — no engineering jargon
